final:
// // When the clock transitions from low to high, the output Q should NOT toggle if J and K are both high, but instead should set Q to low.
module JK_latch (
    input J,
    input K,
    input Clock,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge Clock) begin
        if (J && K) Q <= ~Q; // Toggle
        else if (J) Q <= 1;  // Set
        else if (K) Q <= 0;  // Reset
        // if (J == 0 && K == 0) Q retains its value
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When the clock transitions from low to high, the output Q should NOT toggle if J and K are both high, but instead should set Q to low.
